summary: The file-client downloader divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in canonicality checks, decode loop control, header error futures, and EOF handling; no file-backed client behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 134: M	crates/net/downloaders/src/file_client.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to true/false returns, a break, BadResponse async returns, and an EOF Ok(None) return.
No canonical-block gap detection, chunk decoding, remaining-byte handling, header lookup, bad-response path, or chunk EOF behavior changed.
